channel.title: Problem Sets on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Problem Sets on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Homework 1
item.description: This resource discusses about voltage across and the current through each element in the network and polarity of the voltages.

item.title: Homework 10
item.description: This resource discusses about the inductor and the capacitor and sinusoidal current.

item.title: Homework 11
item.description: This homework assignment focuses on the analysis and design of a system for playing back a digitally-stored audio signal.

item.title: Homework 2
item.description: This resource discusses about resistance, node method and matrix of conductance.

item.title: Homework 3
item.description: This resource discusses about The number of Boolean functions of one variable.

item.title: Homework 4
item.description: This resource discusses about voltage source, the non-ideal voltage and Zener diode.

item.title: Homework 5
item.description: This resource discusses about Thevenin equivalen and amplifiers.

item.title: Homework 6
item.description: This resource discusses about a two-terminal device formed by a MOSFET.

item.title: Homework 7
item.description: This resource discusses about the behavior and application of anew field effect transistor (New FET)with large-signal electrical characteristics

item.title: Homework 9
item.description: This resource discusses about inductance of the all-inductor network, and the capacitance of the all-capacitor network
